title: Cricket — nocturnal AI voice app
prompt: A landing page for Cricket — a late-night AI voice companion that captures, transcribes, and threads the half-formed ideas you have at 2am into something you can act on by morning. Audience: writers, founders, and makers who think after dark. The one action: start a free nightly capture. Feel: calm, atmospheric, nocturnal — not another loud SaaS hero.
